scope.source: the two independently validated witnesses in ../second_center_query
scope.placement_coverage: one explicit admitted named-label placement per profile
scope.question: whether each saved 29-row equality shadow has coordinates after the gauge point 0=(0,0), point 1=(1,0)

encoded: all squared-distance equalities from every one of the 29 serialized rows
exact deduplication of repeated rows with identical center and support
two-dimensional coordinates over QQ polynomial equations
unit-ideal checks over QQ with Singular and msolve in forward and reverse variable order
omitted_fail_closed: off-radius disequalities asserted by exact rows
pairwise distinctness except for the noncollapsed 0/1 coordinate gauge
strict convexity, cyclic orientation inequalities, and cap geometry
minimum-enclosing-circle, non-obtuse, circumscribed-Moser, and liveData geometry
equal-distance pairs not represented by the saved rows
all other named-label placements or orbit representatives
a Lean theorem or a producer theorem

verdict_policy.note: No verdict is an exhaustive card-12 result, a target-faithful counterexample, or a proof of the same-cap producer.
